title: Introduction to Computational Chemistry
description: Survey the landscape of computational chemistry methods, from classical force fields to quantum mechanical approaches, and understand when to use each method and how quantum computers will transform this field.
learningObjectives: Describe the hierarchy of computational chemistry methods
Distinguish between classical and quantum mechanical approaches
Understand the trade-offs between accuracy and computational cost
Identify appropriate methods for different chemical problems
Explain why quantum computers offer advantages for chemistry
Navigate the landscape of computational chemistry software
